arts.ttl: West Brom sweating over availability of 25-year-old for Plymouth Argyle clash
arts.sum: West Brom boss Carlos Corberan has said Jayson Molumby is a ‘doubt’ for this weekend. West Brom are… The post West Brom sweating over availability of 25-year-old for Plymouth Argyle clash appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
Aaron Ashley has taken a look at all of this weekend's Championship matches and provided a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: West Brom injury update as Carlos Corberan sweats on familiar concern
arts.sum: Corberan confirmed that Molumby's week of training and preparation for Plymouth had been disrupted as a result and declared him a doubt to be involved, while he also pointed out that winger Grady Diangana - who missed pre-season but has returned to the squad in recent weeks - is now training normally. There is a familiar West Bromwich Albion injury concern as they welcome Plymouth Argyle to The Hawthorns on Saturday (3pm kick-off), looking to continue their unbeaten run at the beginning of this new season.

arts.ttl: West Brom vs Plymouth predictions: Progressive Pilgrims can pick up a point
arts.sum: West Brom host Plymouth in the Championship at the Hawthorns on Saturday and Dan Childs expects a close contest with the spoils likely to be shared.
